Class MBot2

java.lang.Object
edu.desu.cis.robot.commands.MBot2
public class MBot2 extends Object
Represents an MBot2 robot and provides an interface for controlling it. This class encapsulates the communication with the robot's service layer, allowing for high-level commands to be sent to the robot.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors

    Description
    MBot2(RobotService service)
    Constructs a new MBot2 instance.

  • Constructor Details

    • MBot2

      public MBot2(RobotService service)
      Constructs a new MBot2 instance.
      Parameters:
      service - The RobotService to use for communication with the robot.

  • Method Details

    • straight

      public void straight(double distanceInCm)
      Moves the robot straight for a specified distance.
      Parameters:
      distanceInCm - The distance to move in centimeters.

    • forward

      public void forward(double speed, double time)
      Moves the robot forward for a specified amount of time.
      Parameters:
      time - The duration to move forward in seconds.

    • forward

      public void forward(double speed)
      Moves the robot forward indefinitely.

    • turnLeft

      public void turnLeft(double degrees)
      Turns the robot left by a specified number of degrees.
      Parameters:
      degrees - The angle to turn in degrees.

    • turnRight

      public void turnRight(double degrees)
      Turns the robot right by a specified number of degrees.
      Parameters:
      degrees - The angle to turn in degrees.

    • moveAndTurnLeft

      public void moveAndTurnLeft(double speed, double duration, double diff)
      Turns the robot to the left like a four-wheeled robot.
      Parameters:
      speed - The speed of the robot.
      duration - Amount of time in seconds to move the robot. 0 or negative will move it indefinitely.
      diff - The differential value, which controls the arclength of the turn.

    • moveAndTurnRight

      public void moveAndTurnRight(double speed, double duration, double diff)
      Turns the robot to the left like a four-wheeled robot.
      Parameters:
      speed - The speed of the robot.
      duration - Amount of time in seconds to move the robot. 0 or negative will move it indefinitely.
      diff - The differential value, which controls the arclength of the turn.

    • setMotorPower

      public void setMotorPower(double leftPower, double rightPower)
      Set the left and right motor power.
      Parameters:
      leftPower - The power to set on the left motor. Value must be between -100 and 100.
      rightPower - The power to set on the right motor. Value must be between -100 and 100.

    • setLeftMotorPower

      public void setLeftMotorPower(double power)
      Set the left motor power.
      Parameters:
      power - The power to set on the left motor. Value must be between -100 and 100.

    • setRightMotorPower

      public void setRightMotorPower(double power)
      Set the right motor power.
      Parameters:
      power - The power to set on the right motor. Value must be between -100 and 100.

    • stop

      public void stop()
      Stops the robot's movement.

    • turnLedOn

      public void turnLedOn(int id, int red, int green, int blue)
      Turns on a specific LED with a given color.
      Parameters:
      id - The ID of the LED to turn on.
      red - The red component of the color (0-255).
      green - The green component of the color (0-255).
      blue - The blue component of the color (0-255).

    • showLed

      public void showLed(String colorPattern)
      Displays a color pattern on the LEDs.
      Parameters:
      colorPattern - A string of color(s) of the five LEDs, set in the color1 color2 color3 color4 color5 mode, with one space between any two colors. If you set more than five colors, only the first five colors are used. You can set this parameter to the full name or abbreviation of the colors. The options include the following: red, r green, g blue, b yellow, y cyan, c purple, p white, w orange, o black, k

    • moveLed

      public void moveLed(int step)
      Moves the LED display by a certain step.
      Parameters:
      step - The step to move the LED display.

    • turnLedOff

      public void turnLedOff(int id)
      Turns off a specific LED.
      Parameters:
      id - The ID of the LED to turn off. if id invalid input: '<' 1 or id > 0 then all 5 LEDs are turned off.

    • turnCameraLightOn

      public void turnCameraLightOn()
      Turns on the camera light.

    • turnCameraLightOff

      public void turnCameraLightOff()
      Turns off the camera light.

    • readUltrasonic

      public double readUltrasonic()
      Reads the distance from the ultrasonic sensor.
      Returns:
      The distance in centimeters or -1 if it fails.

    • readLineStatus

      public int readLineStatus()
      Reads the status of the line-following sensor.
      Returns:
      The line status or -1 if it fails.

    • readLineOffsetTrack

      public int readLineOffsetTrack()
      Reads the offset from the line for tracking purposes.
      Returns:
      The line offset track value.

    • getColorObjectFromCamera

      public String getColorObjectFromCamera()
      Gets the color of an object detected by the camera.
      Returns:
      The detected color as a string.

    • getColorObjectFromCamera

      public String getColorObjectFromCamera(boolean needsLight)
      Gets the color of an object detected by the camera.
      Parameters:
      needsLight - if true, turns light on before reading label then turns the light back off; otherwise, does not activate the light.
      Returns:
      The detected color as a string.

    • getLabelFromCamera

      public List<Integer> getLabelFromCamera()
      Gets the labels of objects detected by the camera.
      Returns:
      A list of integer labels for the detected objects or null

    • getLabelFromCamera

      public List<Integer> getLabelFromCamera(boolean needsLight)
      Gets the labels of objects detected by the camera.
      Parameters:
      needsLight - if true, turns light on before reading label then turns the light back off; otherwise, does not activate the light.
      Returns:
      A list of integer labels for the detected objects or null

    • registerTelemetry

      public TelemetryListener registerTelemetry(int port, SensorCache cache)
      Registers a telemetry listener for the robot.
      Parameters:
      port - The port to listen for telemetry data on.
      cache - The SensorCache to store the telemetry data in.
      Returns:
      A TelemetryListener instance if registration is successful, null otherwise.

    • deregisterTelemetry

      public void deregisterTelemetry(TelemetryListener telemetry)
      Deregisters a telemetry listener from the robot.
      Parameters:
      telemetry - The TelemetryListener to deregister.

    • followLine

      public void followLine()
      Commands the robot to start following a line.

    • avoidCrashing

      public void avoidCrashing(double thresholdInCm)
      Commands the robot to enable its anti-crashing behavior.
      Parameters:
      thresholdInCm - The distance threshold in centimeters to avoid a crash.

    • avoidObject

      public void avoidObject()
      Commands the robot to execute its object avoidance routine.

    • moveObject

      public void moveObject()
      Commands the robot to execute its object moving routine.

    • stopAtLine

      public void stopAtLine()
      Commands the robot to stop when a line is detected.

    • collectSample

      public void collectSample()
      Commands the robot to execute its sample collection routine.

    • stopBehavior

      public void stopBehavior(String behaviorName)
      Stops a specific behavior on the robot.
      Parameters:
      behaviorName - The name of the behavior to stop.

    • stopAllBehaviors

      public void stopAllBehaviors()
      Stops all active behaviors on the robot.
